title: providers
description: Tier 2 SOT — General provider metadata consolidated from llm_providers (Tier 1, frozen) + curated documentation. One record per provider name (parallel keys in llm_providers are consolidated here). This is the authoritative catalog used by model-level pipeline (Tier 3) and downstream models (Tier 4).

status.description: Effective status computed from llm_providers sibling keys (any active → active; else most severe)

free_tier.description: Whether the provider offers a free tier / free quota

multi_account.description: Whether llm_providers has multiple keys for this provider. For capacity (paralel) OR multi-purpose (e.g. openrouter inference + provisioning)

multi_purpose.description: True if siblings serve DIFFERENT surfaces (e.g. openrouter inference + provisioning). Openrouter-specific pitfall: NEVER use the inference key to call /v1/models (will fail auth or surface wrong data); always use provisioning key for listing.

key_count.description: Number of valid keys in llm_providers for this provider (active or otherwise)

act_key_count.description: Count of keys with key_status='VALID' OR status='active'

description.description: Human description (curated or inherited from llm_providers.description)

base_url.description: Effective base URL — base_url_actual > base_url (llm_providers), or curated

payload_format.description: SOT format identifier — drives provider_sync fetcher fmt dispatch

models.description: Curated short summary of available models

endpoints.description: How-to-use catalog — per-endpoint URL, method, auth, streaming, purpose, content-type

last_synced_at.description: When llm_providers → providers cascade last ran

t1_source.description: STRICT LINEAGE: name of the T1 collection this T2 providers doc derives from (llm_providers|search_providers|infra_providers|system_credentials). null = no T1 foundation (flagged for review). T1 is the absolute SoT.

t1_source_key.description: the key in t1_source that links back (e.g. llm_providers.provider).

t1_source_status.description: unmapped_no_t1_foundation when no T1 source exists.
